title: Good Evening Florence
description: Florence had one more thing to show us before the day was done.
longDescription:
We were on our way back. A long, good day in the Tuscan wine country behind us, the hotel somewhere ahead. Then the sky happened.

I had the camera because I always have the camera. I found a spot on the bridge and let Florence do the rest. The Arno went still, the Ponte Vecchio settled into the frame, and the clouds caught fire in a way that felt almost unfair for one evening to contain.

Some cities save their best for last. This was Florence saying goodnight.

Florence, Italy. Miss you Coco.
tools: Tools: Sony a7rII & Sony FE 24-105mm f/4 G OSS
